<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band12-1_chunk005.pdf#page=13 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band12 p224 -->

HERRENCHIEMSEE


== HERRENCHIEMSEE ==



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p013_img001.jpg|thumb|W<sub>10</sub> Vespasian]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p013_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p013_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p013_img004.jpg|thumb|V. Vitellius]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p013_img005.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p013_img006.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p013_img007.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band12-1_chunk005_p013_img008.jpg|thumb]]


4
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band12 p225 -->
